companyDescription: Boutique consulting practice specializing in strategic consulting, marketing, digital transformation, and AI enablement.

companyDescription: Global B2B and B2C gaming platform offering payments, tournament registration, and customer engagement tools.

companyDescription: Fortune 500 global developer of integrated resort destinations, among the world's largest gaming and hospitality companies.

companyDescription: The Venetian and The Palazzo, among the largest hotel-resort casinos in the world.
